docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 78555598)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-07-2026 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 76892171) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDIT CORP SOLUTIONS, INC.,
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-07-2026 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 76892171) TO PLAINTIFF CREDIT CORP SOLUTIONS, INC.,
DECLARATION OF PROPER VENUE (TRANSACTION ID # 76892171) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDIT CORP SOLUTIONS, INC.,

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 76892171) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDIT CORP SOLUTIONS, INC., AS TO DEFENDANT CRAIG, ASHLEY DOES 1 THROUGH 15, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-17-2026
